concept: The Orchard OS. A premium, editorial grocery and pantry experience that breaks away from generic tech-green minimalist apps. Combining highly vibrant botanical colors with geometric typography and tactile, retro-modern HUD inventory elements. The app feels like a cross between a high-end culinary magazine and a playful game inventory.

hierarchy.label: text-xs font-sans uppercase tracking-[0.15em] font-bold text-text_secondary

components.cards: rounded-3xl bg-surface border border-border shadow-sm. Avoid soft muddy shadows. Use sharp, clean separation.
components.bento_cards: Use asymmetrical radiuses (e.g., top-right 32px, others 12px) for hero metrics to add organic personality.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-sans font-bold text-lg flex items-center justify-center active:scale-95 transition-transform
buttons.secondary: bg-surface_alt text-text_primary border border-border rounded-full py-4 px-8 font-sans font-bold active:scale-95 transition-transform

components.tab_bar: Floating pill at the bottom of the screen. Use expo-blur for glassmorphism. absolute bottom-8 left-6 right-6 rounded-full flex-row justify-around items-center h-16 bg-white/70 dark:bg-black/60 border border-border overflow-hidden
components.chips: rounded-full px-4 py-2 bg-surface_alt border border-border font-sans font-medium text-sm
components.badges: pill-shaped px-2 py-1 font-sans font-bold text-[10px] uppercase. Use bright saturated background colors with contrasting text (e.g., bg-error text-white for expired).
components.inputs: bg-surface_alt border-2 border-transparent focus:border-primary rounded-2xl p-4 text-base font-sans text-text_primary h-14
components.bottom_sheets: rounded-t-[32px] bg-surface p-6 shadow-lg border-t border-border

spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Utilize flex-row flex-wrap or React Native grid layouts with gap-4. Mix 100% width cards with 48% width cards for tension.

motion_and_animation.style: Bouncy, tactile, physical. Use Spring physics.
motion_and_animation.interactions: Use active:scale-95 on all touchables. Animate list items with a staggered entrance (scale from 0.9, opacity from 0).
motion_and_animation.page_transitions: Fade in and slide up slightly (translateY 20 to 0) using Reanimated.

icons.style: Bold or 2.5 stroke width. Thick, legible lines to match the geometric Outfit font.

screens.Onboarding: Full screen cinematic images. Magazine-style bold text (Fraunces). Bottom absolute positioned CTA with glassmorphism.
screens.Auth: Clean, minimal. Large typographic greeting. Native Apple/Google sign-in buttons styled as rounded-full thick pills.
screens.Dashboard: Top: Greeting and user avatar. Hero Bento Card: 'Expiring Soon' (Vibrant gradient background). Sub-grid: 'Low Stock' (Yuzu Yellow) vs 'Waste/Spending'.
screens.Pantry_Inventory: Sticky horizontal scroll categories (chips) at top. Vertical list of items. Each row features a rounded-2xl image thumbnail, bold title, quantity stepper, and vivid expiry badge.
screens.Scanner: Full-screen camera view using expo-camera. Glassmorphism overlay card at the bottom for quick manual entry. Add a pulsing neon scanner line (react-native-reanimated).
screens.Shopping_List: Clean checklist. Use a satisfying strikethrough animation (Reanimated) when an item is tapped. 'Smart Add' section horizontally scrolls at the top.
screens.Meals_Recipes: Magazine editorial layout. Massive high-quality recipe images overlapping with title cards. Generous whitespace (py-12).
screens.Settings_Profile: Clean list with right chevrons. Grouped by 'Household', 'Preferences', and 'Account'.
screens.Achievements_Analytics: Gamified screen. Use vivid background colors (Radish Pink, Yuzu Yellow) for stat blocks. Bold, massive typography for numbers.

testing.instructions: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `testID` attribute (React Native equivalent of data-testid). Convention: kebab-case, role-based. E.g., testID='add-to-pantry-button', testID='email-input'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Write code using standard `.js` (JSX) syntax, NOT `.tsx` since this project uses JavaScript.
Use React Native core components (View, Text, ScrollView, TouchableOpacity) styled with NativeWind `className` strings.
Use `expo-blur` for glassmorphism effects, especially the floating bottom tab bar.
Use `react-native-reanimated` for spring-based list entrances and button press states (active:scale-95 can be handled by NativeWind or Reanimated).
Retain the existing Larderly logo as requested by the user.
Apply `testID` to all touchable elements, form inputs, and key UI displays for automated testing.
Ensure UI adapts seamlessly to both light and dark modes using NativeWind's `dark:` modifier based on the token palette provided.
